title: Tessellation Studio
description: Five infinite tiling engines — Truchet, Hex Weave, Quasi-Penrose, Islamic Star, Celtic Knot — with animated phase, color harmonics, and PNG/SVG export.
concept: A real-time mathematical tiling playground spanning five distinct geometric traditions. Every pattern tiles the infinite plane and responds to a phase slider that smoothly morphs arc curvatures and rotation. Pick a color harmony preset or paint individual swatches, then pan and zoom to explore detail. Share any state via URL hash or export a print-resolution PNG.
features: 5 tiling algorithms: Truchet arcs, Hex Weave, Quasi-Penrose rhombs, Islamic 8-point star, Celtic Knot grid
8 color harmony presets (Neon, Earth, Ice, Mono, Complementary, Analogous, Triadic, Custom)
Animated phase loop with adjustable speed — morphs arc curves and rotations live
URL hash sharing of full state

interaction.mouse: Drag to pan the infinite tile plane
interaction.click: Click color swatches to repaint; click Play to animate
interaction.touch: Touch-drag to pan; pinch not implemented (use zoom scroll fallback)
